description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage and a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_NAME that includes all untracked files. Add a build_all job in the build stage, tagged with latex, that runs the shell command 'make' and always uploads the extensive list of PDF files (e.g., AlgKT_SS16/algebraische_KTheorie.pdf, Ana1_WS12/analysis1.pdf, …, TG_SS20/TG_SS20.pdf) as artifacts; this job should run on all branches except the master branch of the JaMeZ-B/LaTeX-WWU repository. Add a build_deploy_all job, also in the build stage and tagged latex, that executes 'export SCIEBO' followed by 'make deploy', uploads the same PDF artifacts, and runs only on the master branch of the JaMeZ-B/LaTeX-WWU repository. No Docker image or services are defined.
